title: 《金匮要略》公共转录本校勘见证

retrieval.method: HTTP GET with redirects and a browser-compatible user agent
retrieval.hashMeaning: SHA256 and bytes identify the exact HTML response retrieved for this audit; dynamic pages may produce a different response hash on a later retrieval.
retrieval.archivalBoundary: Only transformed metadata and short public-domain passage witnesses are stored here; fetched HTML is not copied into the repository.

witnesses.locator: 肺痿肺痈咳嗽上气病脉证治第七
witnesses.supports: Reads 大逆上气, agreeing with the local text and disagreeing with the reference wording 火逆上气.
witnesses.excerpt: 大逆上气，咽喉不利，止逆下气者，麦门冬汤主之
witnesses.limitations: Open digital transcription; useful for character-level collation but not a substitute for an identified print edition or image facsimile.

witnesses.locator: 妇人妊娠病脉证并治第二十
witnesses.supports: Preserves 㽲痛 where the local file contains OCR placeholder A2K0痛.
witnesses.excerpt: 妇人怀娠，腹中㽲痛，当归芍药散主之
witnesses.limitations: The witness has 怀娠 while the local file and reference have 怀妊; it is used only to support the 㽲 character.

witnesses.locator: 妇人产后病脉证治第二十一
witnesses.supports: Reads 结在膀胱, correcting the local OCR/transcription 膀肽.
witnesses.limitations: Open digital transcription used only for character-level collation.

witnesses.locator: 肺痿第七、妇人妊娠第二十、妇人产后第二十一
witnesses.supports: Independently reads 大逆上氣, 腹中㽲痛, and 結在膀胱.
witnesses.excerpt: 大逆上氣；腹中㽲痛；結在膀胱
witnesses.limitations: Community-maintained digital transcription; used only as an independent collation witness.
